news.title:
Morgan Stanley initiates coverage on Torrent Pharma with Equal Weight rating.
The brokerage has set a target price of ₹4,580 for Torrent Pharma.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tribunal issued corrigendum for J.B. Chemicals' merger with Torrent Pharma.
Corrigendum order uploaded on Tribunal's website after earlier intimation.
news.summary:
Tribunal issued corrigendum for J.B. Chemicals' merger with Torrent Pharma.
Corrigendum order uploaded on Tribunal's website after earlier intimation.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals informed about NCLT Ahmedabad's order on J.B. Chemicals merger.
The order pertains to the first motion application for the amalgamation scheme.
news.summary:

news.title:
Torrent Pharma sees 11.4% rise in open interest to 20,544 contracts.
Volume patterns and price action indicate potential recalibration by traders.
news.summary:

news.title:
ICICI Securities highlights disruption in India's Rs 1.6B GLP-1 market with generics entering, priced 50-90% lower than innovators.
Torrent Pharma leads as the only listed Indian firm announcing oral semaglutide plans, with generics boosting access and competition.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities highlights disruption in India's Rs 1.6B GLP-1 market with generics entering, priced 50-90% lower than innovators.
Torrent Pharma leads as the only listed Indian firm announcing oral semaglutide plans, with generics boosting access and competition.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma launches oral and injectable Semaglutide in India, targeting type 2 diabetes and obesity.
Injectable Semaglutide priced at Rs. 3,999/month; first Indian firm with generic oral Semaglutide.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma launches oral and injectable Semaglutide in India, targeting type 2 diabetes and obesity.
Injectable Semaglutide priced at Rs. 3,999/month; first Indian firm with generic oral Semaglutide.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Torrent Pharma, targeting Rs 5,100, citing JB acquisition synergies, double-digit India growth, and US business scaling $200m+.
EBITDA margins to expand; net debt turning to net cash by FY30 despite possible soft Q4FY26.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Torrent Pharma, targeting Rs 5,100, citing JB acquisition synergies, double-digit India growth, and US business scaling $200m+.
EBITDA margins to expand; net debt turning to net cash by FY30 despite possible soft Q4FY26.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma shares rose over 4% post Q3 results.
GMR Airports shares also surged over 5% after Q3 results.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma shares rose over 4% post Q3 results.
GMR Airports shares also surged over 5% after Q3 results.

Torrent Pharma shares audio recording of analyst call for Q3 and 9-month results ended Dec 2025.
Recording available on company's website under investor section for stakeholders' access.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma Q3 net profit surged 26.3% to ₹635 Cr; revenue grew 17.6% to ₹3,303 Cr.
Announced ₹29/share interim dividend; shares closed at ₹4,074.05, down 0.18% on BSE.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma Q3 net profit surged 26.3% to ₹635 Cr; revenue grew 17.6% to ₹3,303 Cr.
Announced ₹29/share interim dividend; shares closed at ₹4,074.05, down 0.18% on BSE.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals' board recommends Rs 29 interim dividend per share.
The dividend proposal is subject to shareholder approval.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals' board recommends Rs 29 interim dividend per share.
The dividend proposal is subject to shareholder approval.

news.title:
Indian bond issuances rise, with states raising ₹380B and corporates like Axis Bank, NHPC, and REC planning major fundraising.
Major corporates include JSW Steel (₹50B), Torrent Pharma (₹30B), and Prestige Estates (₹20B). Municipal issuances also active.
news.summary:
Indian bond issuances rise, with states raising ₹380B and corporates like Axis Bank, NHPC, and REC planning major fundraising.
Major corporates include JSW Steel (₹50B), Torrent Pharma (₹30B), and Prestige Estates (₹20B). Municipal issuances also active.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals sets 19th Feb 2026 as record date for interim dividend eligibility.
Board meeting scheduled on 13th Feb 2026 to decide on interim dividend declaration.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals sets 19th Feb 2026 as record date for interim dividend eligibility.
Board meeting scheduled on 13th Feb 2026 to decide on interim dividend declaration.

news.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals to discuss Q3 FY25 results and interim dividend in board meeting.
news.summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals to discuss Q3 FY25 results and interim dividend in board meeting.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma merges with JB Chemicals, creating India's 5th largest pharma firm by market share and 2nd by market cap.
The merger enhances Torrent's chronic therapy portfolio, CDMO capabilities, and global footprint with synergies in products and operations.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma merges with JB Chemicals, creating India's 5th largest pharma firm by market share and 2nd by market cap.
The merger enhances Torrent's chronic therapy portfolio, CDMO capabilities, and global footprint with synergies in products and operations.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma appoints Geena Malhotra as CTO effective 1 Feb 2026.
Malhotra, ex-Cipla CTO, brings 40 years of pharma R&D and leadership expertise.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma appoints Geena Malhotra as CTO effective 1 Feb 2026.
Malhotra, ex-Cipla CTO, brings 40 years of pharma R&D and leadership expertise.
